category_sources: Official homepage describes flactag as a utility for tagging FLAC files using MusicBrainz data.
source_facts.description says flactag tags single album FLAC files with MusicBrainz CUE sheets.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project homepage is the primary documentation surface with download, build, usage, and configuration sections.
repo_sources: Official homepage discusses building from the repository and version-control tags.
SourceForge project files page lists Git and SVN project navigation for flactag.
tags_sources: Official homepage documents interactive and batch tagging, MusicBrainz server configuration, and file renaming.
source_facts.description mentions FLAC tagging, MusicBrainz, and CUE sheets.
